case_title: MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. VS. NELSON AGUIRRE ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 210001839) TO PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $9.57 AS TO DEFENDANT AGUIRRE, NELSON
DECLARATION OF VENUE (TRANSACTION ID # 210001839) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.
DECLARATION RE: CCP 1033; INTEREST; AND EVIDENCE CODE 1550 (TRANSACTION ID # 67797039) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $302.95 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 67797039) AS TO DEFENDANT AGUIRRE, NELSON

DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 585(D) AND 1788.60 (TRANSACTION ID # 67797039) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AGUIRRE, NELSON $6,667.18 PRINCIPAL, $302.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,970.13, SEE SCANNED DOC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210001839) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT AGUIRRE, NELSON DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-29-2022
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED ($.00 ON INTEREST, $.00 ON PRINCIPAL), $145.12 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 68680219) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.
